{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Sales Executive",
  "description": "Vantegral Consulting -&nbsp;Our client in the technology solutions space&nbsp;is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Technology / Telecommunications

Job Summary


	We are looking for an experienced Senior Sales Executive to drive revenue growth and expand our client base within the technology solutions space.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, converting leads into paying customers, and maintaining strong relationships with existing clients.
	This role requires a proactive and results-driven sales professional who can manage the entire sales cycle, from prospecting and presentations to negotiation and closing deals.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to generate revenue.
	Build and manage a strong pipeline of prospective clients.
	Develop and maintain long-term relationships with clients.
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure.
	Conduct product presentations and demonstrations to potential clients.
	Meet and exceed monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.
	Collaborate with marketing and product teams on sales campaigns.
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities in CRM systems.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer feedback.
	Prepare sales proposals, quotations, and contracts.
	Support post-sale client engagement to ensure customer satisfaction.
	Prepare weekly and monthly sales performance reports.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	Minimum of 4 years of experience in B2B or B2C sales, preferably in technology or telecom.
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and communication skills.
	Excellent relationship management and interpersonal skills.
	Familiarity with CRM systems such as Zoho, HubSpot, or Salesforce.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools.
	Willingness to travel locally for client meetings.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-17",
  "validThrough": "2026-03-27",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Senior Sales Executive Job at Vantegral Consulting




        
    

        
        Vantegral Consulting - Our client in the technology solutions space is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Executive

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Technology / Telecommunications

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an experienced Senior Sales Executive to drive revenue growth and expand our client base within the technology solutions space.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, converting leads into paying customers, and maintaining strong relationships with existing clients.
	This role requires a proactive and results-driven sales professional who can manage the entire sales cycle, from prospecting and presentations to negotiation and closing deals.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to generate revenue.
	Build and manage a strong pipeline of prospective clients.
	Develop and maintain long-term relationships with clients.
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure.
	Conduct product presentations and demonstrations to potential clients.
	Meet and exceed monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.
	Collaborate with marketing and product teams on sales campaigns.
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities in CRM systems.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer feedback.
	Prepare sales proposals, quotations, and contracts.
	Support post-sale client engagement to ensure customer satisfaction.
	Prepare weekly and monthly sales performance reports.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	Minimum of 4 years of experience in B2B or B2C sales, preferably in technology or telecom.
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and communication skills.
	Excellent relationship management and interpersonal skills.
	Familiarity with CRM systems such as Zoho, HubSpot, or Salesforce.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools.
	Willingness to travel locally for client meetings.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resources Manager",
  "description": "Mettle Consulting - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Human Resources Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	The Human Resources Manager is responsible for overseeing the full spectrum of HR operations for the business.
	This includes recruitment, employee relations, performance management, compliance, and organizational development.
	The role ensures that the company attracts, develops, and retains competent employees who can drive sales performance and operational efficiency.
	The ideal candidate must have a minimum of five (5) years of experience managing people and HR processes within a structured business environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures aligned with the company&rsquo;s operational and sales objectives.&nbsp;
	Manage the day-to-day HR functions including employee records, HR documentation, and compliance with labor regulations.
	Oversee the recruitment and selection process for sales consultants, administrative staff, and operational personnel. Ensure the business hires competent employees capable of delivering strong sales and customer service outcomes.&nbsp;
	Coordinate onboarding and probation management for new hires.
	Design and manage performance appraisal systems that align with sales targets and operational KPIs.&nbsp;
	Work closely with department heads to track employee performance, identify gaps, and implement improvement plans where necessary.
	Serve as the primary point of contact for employee relations issues. Handle grievances, disciplinary processes, and conflict resolution in line with company policies.&nbsp;
	Promote a professional workplace culture that supports teamwork and accountability. Identify skill gaps within the sales and operations teams and coordinate training programs to improve product knowledge, sales capability, and customer service standards.
	Support management in structuring competitive compensation and incentive systems for sales staff and other employees.&nbsp;
	Ensure accurate payroll inputs and benefits administration.
	Ensure compliance with applicable labor laws and company policies.&nbsp;
	Maintain accurate personnel records and ensure proper documentation for contracts, disciplinary actions, and terminations.
	Support leadership with manpower planning to ensure the business maintains the right staffing levels to meet sales targets and operational needs.


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	At least five (5) years of experience in Human Resources with proven experience managing people and HR operations.
	Strong knowledge of recruitment, employee relations, and performance management practices.
	Experience supporting sales-driven or customer-facing teams is an advantage.
	Good understanding of labor regulations and HR compliance requirements.
	Strong interpersonal, negotiation, and conflict resolution skills.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@mettleconsults.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Application &ndash; Human Resource Manager&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-31",

Human Resources Manager Job at Mettle Consulting




        
    

        
        Mettle Consulting - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Manager

Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Human Resources Manager is responsible for overseeing the full spectrum of HR operations for the business.
	This includes recruitment, employee relations, performance management, compliance, and organizational development.
	The role ensures that the company attracts, develops, and retains competent employees who can drive sales performance and operational efficiency.
	The ideal candidate must have a minimum of five (5) years of experience managing people and HR processes within a structured business environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures aligned with the company’s operational and sales objectives. 
	Manage the day-to-day HR functions including employee records, HR documentation, and compliance with labor regulations.
	Oversee the recruitment and selection process for sales consultants, administrative staff, and operational personnel. Ensure the business hires competent employees capable of delivering strong sales and customer service outcomes. 
	Coordinate onboarding and probation management for new hires.
	Design and manage performance appraisal systems that align with sales targets and operational KPIs. 
	Work closely with department heads to track employee performance, identify gaps, and implement improvement plans where necessary.
	Serve as the primary point of contact for employee relations issues. Handle grievances, disciplinary processes, and conflict resolution in line with company policies. 
	Promote a professional workplace culture that supports teamwork and accountability. Identify skill gaps within the sales and operations teams and coordinate training programs to improve product knowledge, sales capability, and customer service standards.
	Support management in structuring competitive compensation and incentive systems for sales staff and other employees. 
	Ensure accurate payroll inputs and benefits administration.
	Ensure compliance with applicable labor laws and company policies. 
	Maintain accurate personnel records and ensure proper documentation for contracts, disciplinary actions, and terminations.
	Support leadership with manpower planning to ensure the business maintains the right staffing levels to meet sales targets and operational needs.


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	At least five (5) years of experience in Human Resources with proven experience managing people and HR operations.
	Strong knowledge of recruitment, employee relations, and performance management practices.
	Experience supporting sales-driven or customer-facing teams is an advantage.
	Good understanding of labor regulations and HR compliance requirements.
	Strong interpersonal, negotiation, and conflict resolution skills.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Application – Human Resource Manager” as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
